expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint covers panel-stack composition, embedding lifecycle boundaries, and visible failure or recovery outcomes
expectations.evidence: The result explicitly states the required coverage areas but does not actually cover them with a shipment checkpoint artifact; it declares the run blocked due to missing evidence: “BLOCKED / NOT DEMONSTRABLE WITH PROVIDED EVIDENCE” and “there is insufficient admissible evidence to produce a compliant phase5b checkpoint artifact”. It further marks this expectation as “Not achievable”.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The output cannot demonstrate alignment to phase5b requirements and explicitly says so: “Phase alignment check (phase5b) Cannot be verified without SKILL.md” and “Output aligns with phase5b: Not achievable (SKILL.md not available; phase requirements cannot be applied).”
